title: justicia leucophloea
intro: Justicia leucophloea, also known as the White-flowered Justicia, is a plant species native to tropical Asia, characterized by its white or pale yellow flowers and oval-shaped leaves. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Justicia leucophloea include its potential to reduce fever, treat skin infections, and alleviate respiratory issues such as cough and bronchitis. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and powders, which can be consumed as teas or applied topically to the skin for therapeutic purposes.
